title: Create builders
description: It's datapack based on mod "Create more automation" with additional recipies.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76aace148c5a49a9af5fb8f581c136f2b8b8a8f9.png)

## 📖 Create builders
Quality of life datapack which adds creafting recipies for your automating world concuest. This package is created for people like me who want to automate everything possible, or those who dream of gigaprojects that require tons of resources.

## 📋 Recipes 

- **Asurine**, which can be used to produce zinc.
- **Veridium**, with this, you can make copper.
- **Crimsite**, you can use that to make iron more efficient.
- **Ochrum**, more easier way to automate gold production.
- **Lapis**, this is for asurine production, you can make scoria out of lava and chocolate, instead of water in cabblestone generator.
- **Redstone**, you can make red dye out of beetroot.
- **Green_dye**, i created alternate recipie, if you can't find desert.
- **Obsidian**, more lagless way to make obsidian.
- **Expirience**, more convinient way to repair your tools!
- **Diamond**, i took this recipie from mod "Create stuff & additions".
- **Yellow dye** recipe for you big projects.
- **Deepslate** recipe.
- **Dripstone** recipe.
- **Dirt**, if want to make a big farm, or dirt brick automation.
- **Coarse dirt**, useful for builders.
- **End stone**, might be used for mixing with other blocks
- **Coal ore**, renewable fuel, and might be used in gradients
- **Froglights**, recipe for mass produce froglights
- **Warped log**, mostly for builders
- **Crimson log**, also for builders
- **Nether wart block**, alternate recipie to make this block
- **Warped wart blick**, may be used for decoration

**You can also see recipes in the gallery tab**\
Use JEI or REI for best expirience

This datapack based on forge mod "Create more automation".
